name: Yellow Gazpacho and Blackened Shrimp Cocktail
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients for gazpacho in a food processor and blend until souplike consistency.
2. Chill the gazpacho mixture.
3. Season shrimp with blackening seasoning and sauté in hot butter until done, about 3 minutes.
4. For decoration, use slices of cucumber, lime, sweet mini red peppers, chives, green onions, and rosemary.
5. Pour gazpacho into a cocktail or martini glass.
6. Decorate with cucumber slices, lime, rosemary, and chives on the side of the glass.
7. Place some sweet red pepper in the middle of the gazpacho.
8. Hang 5 shrimp (hot or cold) off the side of the glass.
Yield: 4 Servings
